body.title: Tool discovery habit — Igor can enumerate available tools
body.result: Seeded INTERP_FACIA_TOOL_DISCOVERY facia memory (entry point to tool discovery capability) and PROC_TOOL_DISCOVERY habit (fires on 'what tools do i have?' intent). Habit calls get_tool_registry_report and routes response through normal synthesis. 567 tests pass. Commit: 4b2bbe6a.
body.description: Igor has 191 registered tools including get_tool_registry_report but no habit that fires when he asks 'what tools do I have?' / 'what can I do?' / 'what's the tool name?'. Fix: (1) seed INTERPRETIVE memory explaining get_tool_registry_report exists and how to use it for self-inventory, (2) seed habit PROC_TOOL_DISCOVERY that fires on tool-discovery intent (triggers: 'what tool', 'list my tools', 'what can i do') → calls get_tool_registry_report.
